status_legend.implemented_fullstack: Backend truth and frontend behavior both match the contract.
status_legend.implemented_backend_only: Backend supports/enforces; frontend does not correctly use/show/enforce.
status_legend.implemented_frontend_only: Frontend implements intent; backend does not fully support/enforce.
status_legend.partial_match: Some but not all required contract behavior is present.
status_legend.semantic_mismatch: Implementation exists but meaning/behavior differs from the contract.
status_legend.blocked_by_backend_contract: Frontend cannot be truthful because backend lacks data/enforcement.
status_legend.unclear_needs_manual_review: Ambiguous from repo evidence; manual verification required.

notes: JSON contract is the execution contract; Permissions.md is explanatory. Where they differ, JSON governs this audit.
Backend evidence is primarily from rovno-db supabase/migrations (not a live DB).

findings.intended_behavior: Permissions enforced at real access level (API/RLS/RPC), not UI-only.
findings.backend_support: Strong for finance-detail via can_view_sensitive_detail + RLS on estimate_resource_lines, procurement_items, order_lines, hr_items/hr_payments (20260325100000_sensitive_visibility_and_document_classification.sql). Operational summary RPCs bypass some table RLS by design (security definer).
findings.frontend_support: Authority seam (buildProjectAuthoritySeam + membership finance_visibility) aligns with several gates; separate coarse permission-matrix (can/Action) is not derived from backend truth for all surfaces.
findings.observed_behavior: Mixed: sensitive domains use backend helpers, but action capability (e.g. procurement.edit for contractor) is not proven aligned with contract action states in all flows.
findings.required_follow_up: Trace each contract Action family to an explicit backend enforcement point; reconcile permission-matrix actions with RPC/RLS outcomes.

findings.intended_behavior: Hidden domains/surfaces inaccessible via URL, API, AI, exports, indirect paths.
findings.backend_support: Participants-style hiding is not expressed as HR role checks in get_hr_operational_summary (only can_access_project). HR base SELECT requires can_view_sensitive_detail, but the RPC reads hr_items regardless.
findings.frontend_support: ProjectLayout blocks routes when domain access is hidden; HR uses getProjectDomainAccess returning view for viewer/contractor, so /project/:id/hr is allowed.
findings.observed_behavior: Viewer/contractor can open HR route and hydrate HR-shaped data via operational RPC; contract says HR domain hidden for those roles.
findings.required_follow_up: Align domains.hr per-role domain_access with route gates and RPC eligibility; remove cross-role HR leakage from get_hr_operational_summary or gate by role/finance/domain authority.

findings.intended_behavior: hidden
findings.backend_support: hr_items_select requires can_view_sensitive_detail (detail finance), but get_hr_operational_summary returns HR rows for any project member.
findings.frontend_support: getProjectDomainAccessForRole maps hr to view for viewer (should be hidden).
findings.observed_behavior: HR tab visible; RPC returns HR items including compensation_type; contradicts hidden domain.
findings.required_follow_up: Set frontend hr domain to hidden for viewer; deny HR RPCs or return empty for disallowed roles; strip compensation fields for any non-HR-eligible caller.

findings.intended_behavior: hidden
findings.backend_support: Same HR RPC leakage as viewer case.
findings.frontend_support: getProjectDomainAccessForRole returns view for contractor on hr.
findings.observed_behavior: Same as viewer: operational HR data reachable while contract requires hidden domain.
findings.required_follow_up: Same as domains.hr viewer hidden remediation.

findings.intended_behavior: When HR hidden, no compensation / payroll semantics exposed.
findings.backend_support: get_hr_operational_summary exposes compensation_type to all members; planned/actual costs null unless finance detail.
findings.frontend_support: HR list renders from RPC-shaped items including compensation typing in mappings (hr-source shapeHROperationalRpcItems uses compensation_type).
findings.observed_behavior: Compensation classification can surface to roles that must not see HR per contract.
findings.required_follow_up: Gate HR RPC by HR domain authority; redact compensation_type and other HR semantics for ineligible roles.

findings.intended_behavior: manage baseline for HR surfaces.
findings.backend_support: Direct hr_items/hr_payments SELECT gated by can_view_sensitive_detail; co_owner effective finance may be summary (effective_finance_visibility), blocking SELECT while RPC still returns rows. assertProjectHRItemExists uses direct select and may fail under RLS for summary-only co_owners.
findings.frontend_support: UI treats HR as view-capable for non-owner/co_owner incorrectly; for co_owner, page uses seamCanViewSensitiveDetail for some reads (ProjectHR.tsx).
findings.observed_behavior: Risk split-brain: manage intent vs detail-only RLS + operational RPC filler paths; mutations may error on existence checks.
findings.required_follow_up: Define authoritative HR read model for manage roles independent of personal finance_visibility, or align co_owner finance defaults with manage HR contract.

findings.intended_behavior: Includes client_unit, client_total, discounted_client_total; hides cost and profitability fields.
findings.backend_support: get_estimate_operational_summary sets client_unit_price_cents and client_total_price_cents only when effective_finance_visibility = detail (20260405120000_resource_type_operational_visibility_and_hr_rpc.sql). Summary finance yields null client money in RPC payload.
findings.frontend_support: Estimate page gates internal columns with seamCanViewSensitiveDetail; summary client money depends on hydrated line fields / RPC completeness.
findings.observed_behavior: Backend read path for summary users cannot supply contract-required client money fields via operational RPC as currently defined.
findings.required_follow_up: Extend operational summary (or alternate RPC) to emit contract-defined client-safe amounts at finance_visibility summary while still suppressing internal cost fields.

findings.intended_behavior: Same summary column contract as viewer for table_rows summary tier.
findings.backend_support: Same RPC redaction as viewer summary (client money only at detail).
findings.frontend_support: Same dependency on operational hydration.
findings.observed_behavior: Same gap: summary-tier client totals not carried by RPC fields.
findings.required_follow_up: Same as prior estimate operational summary follow-up.

findings.intended_behavior: hidden
findings.backend_support: Not a UI concern; export is client-generated CSV.
findings.frontend_support: Export CSV button rendered whenever showEstimateWorkspace without role/action gating matching contract hidden state.
findings.observed_behavior: Viewer can trigger export; handleExportCsv still appends tax/total rows even in operational branches (ProjectEstimate.tsx lines ~1590-1597), conflicting with finance none / hidden export action.
findings.required_follow_up: Hide export for roles/actions per matrix; strip monetary rows from CSV when finance visibility is none or export action is hidden.

findings.intended_behavior: hidden
findings.backend_support: N/A
findings.frontend_support: Same export control gap as viewer.
findings.observed_behavior: Same export availability.
findings.required_follow_up: Same as viewer export remediation.

findings.intended_behavior: [requested, ordered, in_stock]
findings.backend_support: Operational RPCs do not encode tab visibility; enforcement is client/route level.
findings.frontend_support: visibleTabs for non-manage excludes requested (ProjectProcurement.tsx uses [ordered, in_stock] only).
findings.observed_behavior: Requested tab not available to viewer despite contract.
findings.required_follow_up: Show requested tab for summary-domain roles; render rows per procurement surface field contract (operational-only, no money).

findings.intended_behavior: [requested, ordered, in_stock]
findings.backend_support: N/A
findings.frontend_support: Same visibleTabs logic ties requested tab to manage only.
findings.observed_behavior: Contractor also missing requested tab.
findings.required_follow_up: Same as viewer procurement tabs.

findings.intended_behavior: Viewer summary/none: supplier_name hidden among other fields.
findings.backend_support: Operational ordered payload excludes supplier fields by schema; client may still receive supplier via non-RPC paths.
findings.frontend_support: Order header renders order.supplierName for all non-manage users when present (ProjectProcurement.tsx).
findings.observed_behavior: Supplier name visible to viewer in ordered surface → violates contract supplier visibility rule.
findings.required_follow_up: Hide supplier for viewer; show for contractor per contract; ensure data sources do not bypass UI gate.

findings.intended_behavior: disabled_visible
findings.backend_support: Unknown without tracing write RPCs; likely blocked for non-manage via can_write_project_content.
findings.frontend_support: Primary procurement actions gated by canManageProcurement; disabled_visible pattern not implemented (actions absent rather than visibly disabled).
findings.observed_behavior: Contractor does not see disabled order/receive/use controls as specified.
findings.required_follow_up: Introduce explicit disabled_visible controls for contractor default preset; align tooltips with advanced permissions story.

findings.intended_behavior: true (role manage baseline, independent of personal finance summary in contract JSON co_owner block)
findings.backend_support: N/A for this UI block.
findings.frontend_support: Header KPIs render only when seamCanViewSensitiveDetail (finance detail), not when co_owner has summary finance visibility.
findings.observed_behavior: Co-owner with summary financial visibility may miss procurement financial header though contract marks it visible for co_owner manage role.
findings.required_follow_up: Decouple procurement manage header visibility from viewer-style finance detail where contract ties header to role manage.

findings.intended_behavior: Until backend-backed client-facing procurement money model exists, summary shows no money fields.
findings.backend_support: get_procurement_operational_summary avoids money fields in ordered_lines payload (post phase-6 migrations).
findings.frontend_support: Unit price / line totals columns gated by canViewSensitiveDetail; header KPIs also gated by detail.
findings.observed_behavior: Largely aligned for summary-tier users on ordered rows; supplier leak and tab gaps are separate findings.
findings.required_follow_up: Close supplier leak + verify no other procurement summary surfaces format currency from internal pricing.

findings.intended_behavior: Hide internal aggregate currency, internal budget/spend/variance widgets; allow non-sensitive widgets.
findings.backend_support: N/A for dashboard composition.
findings.frontend_support: BudgetWidget only mounts when seamCanViewSensitiveDetail (detail finance), not summary-specific allowance model.
findings.observed_behavior: Summary-tier users lose entire budget widget rather than contract's selective hide list; may be stricter than contract or may omit allowed summary monetary widgets if any are intended.
findings.required_follow_up: Map dashboard widgets to contract block lists for each financial_visibility tier; implement summary-safe monetary widgets only when backed by data contract.

findings.intended_behavior: evaluate_per_project
findings.backend_support: effective_finance_visibility is per project membership row.
findings.frontend_support: useWorkspaceProjectsSensitiveDetailMap computes seamCanViewSensitiveDetail per project.
findings.observed_behavior: Per-project evaluation exists for home-style gating.
findings.required_follow_up: Extend same per-project rigor to any remaining global assumptions (spot-check workspace selectors).

findings.intended_behavior: hidden
findings.backend_support: Not exhaustively traced; frontend routing uses domain hidden.
findings.frontend_support: getProjectDomainAccess returns hidden; ProjectLayout blocks participants route; tabs omit Participants when hidden.
findings.observed_behavior: Matches contract for navigation + tabs under current role→domain table.
findings.required_follow_up: Verify backend invite/participant RPCs reject viewer where RLS does not already.

findings.intended_behavior: change_status/edit_checklist/comment/upload hidden
findings.backend_support: Task mutation policies not re-audited line-by-line in this pass.
findings.frontend_support: ProjectTasks uses projectDomainAllowsContribute: viewer false → no status/checklist/comment/upload affordances.
findings.observed_behavior: UI aligns with JSON contract action states for viewer.
findings.required_follow_up: Confirm Supabase policies block the same mutations server-side for viewer.

findings.intended_behavior: change_status/edit_checklist/comment/upload_document/upload_media enabled
findings.backend_support: Not fully verified in this audit.
findings.frontend_support: Contribute path enables the listed interactions when not blocked by sync/regime flags.
findings.observed_behavior: Appears aligned in UI intent; needs backend parity confirmation.
findings.required_follow_up: Trace planning-source / Supabase mutations against contractor contract.

findings.intended_behavior: Documents/media visibly labeled with shared_project vs internal classification.
findings.backend_support: visibility_class columns enforced at storage boundary (multiple migrations).
findings.frontend_support: No rovno src matches for visibility_class string in TS/TSX at audit time (grep empty).
findings.observed_behavior: Likely missing or uses different naming; cannot confirm visual labeling requirement from scanned sources.
findings.required_follow_up: Surface visibility_class (or mapped label) consistently in list/grid/preview/upload confirm; align copy with contract taxonomy only.

findings.intended_behavior: explicit_fallback_required; must_not_imply_richer_taxonomy
findings.backend_support: Defaults exist (e.g. shared_project default on columns).
findings.frontend_support: Not verified; depends on upload UX and labeling (see prior finding).
findings.observed_behavior: Unclear from code scan whether explicit fallback UX exists.
findings.required_follow_up: Manual UX pass on upload + legacy content rows.

findings.intended_behavior: Activity rows must not expose hidden sensitive payloads.
findings.backend_support: activity_events_select uses can_access_project only (20260306170000_grants_rls_enablement_and_policies.sql); payload columns are not filtered per viewer finance/HR hiding in policy snippet reviewed.
findings.frontend_support: Not traced in this audit.
findings.observed_behavior: Risk: activity readable for all project members without finance/HR dimension checks at policy level.
findings.required_follow_up: Inventory activity payload shapes vs contract hidden domains; add redaction or domain-scoped policies.

findings.intended_behavior: inherit_visibility/actions; no reveal of hidden fields; no execution of hidden/disabled actions; confirmation does not grant permission.
findings.backend_support: No rovno-db AI runtime audited here (likely external).
findings.frontend_support: ContextInspector packs finance/procurement summaries without mirroring full permission matrix; seamAllowsAction exists for some paths.
findings.observed_behavior: No end-to-end proof AI tools are constrained to user envelope in repo alone.
findings.required_follow_up: Audit AI tool allowlists + server prompts against contract ai_enforcement and domains.ai_project_surface; treat dev context packs as product-risk if reachable.

findings.intended_behavior: can_access_visible_project_information_only; can_execute_only_enabled_actions
findings.backend_support: Depends on AI service (out of repo scope for this file audit).
findings.frontend_support: No verified wiring from this audit that enforces subset on all AI entry points.
findings.observed_behavior: Cannot certify compliance from rovno/rovno-db static review alone.
findings.required_follow_up: System-level AI policy review with runtime tests attempting hidden-field prompts and disabled-action execution.

findings.intended_behavior: No default procurement management; procurement actions are disabled_visible, not operational manage, for contractor preset.
findings.backend_support: Not fully traced to RPC authorization layers in this audit.
findings.frontend_support: permission-matrix grants procurement.edit to contractor while contract emphasizes summary domain + disabled actions, not broad edit entitlement.
findings.observed_behavior: Potential drift between coarse Action flags and domain-level contract language.
findings.required_follow_up: Replace or narrow procurement.edit to match contract action families and advanced-permissions overrides.

findings.intended_behavior: summary vs none vs detail field sets per Permissions.md + JSON surfaces.upper_block
findings.backend_support: Operational RPC suppresses client totals unless detail, conflicting with summary upper block expectations analogous to table rows.
findings.frontend_support: Upper block uses canViewSensitiveDetail / operational flags in multiple sections (further field-by-field review recommended).
findings.observed_behavior: At minimum, shared RPC limitation implies summary upper block cannot be backend-backed faithfully without changes (see estimate RPC finding).
findings.required_follow_up: Field-by-field matrix for upper_block vs current estimate hydration sources.

findings.intended_behavior: Documents/media classification and internal visibility should participate in authority envelope (related to documents_media domain + shared_rules).
findings.backend_support: effective_internal_docs_visibility + can_view_internal_documents exist in SQL.
findings.frontend_support: project-authority-seam.ts documents drift: internal_docs_visibility not on generated Member type / seam yet.
findings.observed_behavior: Frontend cannot consistently enforce internal doc visibility from seam until types + hydration updated.
findings.required_follow_up: Regenerate backend-truth types from rovno-db; extend Member + seam; wire UI/guards to internal_docs_visibility.
